identity.name: Kkemi Design Studio
identity.archetype: The Artisan Architect - blending raw material (paper/ink) with structural precision

usage_rules.hero_text: Use Playfair Display Italic for emphasis words within a standard Playfair sentence.
usage_rules.section_numbers: Use Space Mono (e.g., '(01)') for section indexing.
usage_rules.mix: Always pair Serif headings with Sans-serif body text for high contrast.

grids.gallery: flex overflow-x-auto snap-x snap-mandatory gap-8 scrollbar-hide

texture.grain: fixed inset-0 pointer-events-none opacity-[0.03] z-50 mix-blend-multiply bg-[url('https://grainy-gradients.vercel.app/noise.svg')]
texture.paper_edge: Rough ragged edge SVG separator between dark and light sections.

cursor.default: w-4 h-4 bg-accent-gold rounded-full fixed pointer-events-none z-[100] mix-blend-difference transition-transform duration-200

primary.classes: relative px-8 py-4 bg-foreground-default text-background-default rounded-full overflow-hidden group hover:scale-105 transition-transform duration-300
primary.animation: Fill effect from bottom on hover

secondary.classes: px-6 py-3 border border-current text-foreground-default rounded-full hover:bg-foreground-default hover:text-background-default transition-colors duration-300

whatsapp.classes: fixed bottom-8 right-8 w-16 h-16 bg-[#25D366] text-white rounded-full shadow-2xl z-40 flex items-center justify-center hover:scale-110 transition-transform duration-300

header.classes: fixed top-0 left-0 w-full z-40 px-6 py-6 mix-blend-difference text-white flex justify-between items-center transition-all duration-300

menu_items.classes: font-accent uppercase text-sm tracking-widest hover:text-accent-gold transition-colors

service_card.classes: group relative p-8 border border-black/10 bg-white/50 backdrop-blur-sm hover:bg-white transition-colors duration-500 overflow-hidden
service_card.interaction: Reveal image or color on hover

portfolio_item.classes: min-w-[80vw] md:min-w-[45vw] h-[60vh] relative group overflow-hidden

libraries: gsap (Optional, prioritize Framer Motion for React simplicity)

specific_animations.text_reveal: Words slide up from 100% y-offset with overflow hidden.
specific_animations.parallax: Images move 20% slower than scroll speed.

phase_1_setup: Configure Tailwind colors and fonts in tailwind.config.js
Set up global CSS for grain and smooth scroll
phase_3_sections: Contact: Form with file upload + Map
phase_4_polish: Test responsiveness (Stack horizontal scroll on mobile)

rules: DO NOT use generic centered layouts. Use asymmetry.
Ensure text contrast meets APCA/WCAG AA standards.
Mobile First: Horizontal scrolls must become vertical lists on mobile.
